hypotheses.hypothesis: A Cloudflare-only push could still redeploy GKE because pnpm-lock.yaml is treated as a shared frontend input.
hypotheses.mitigation: Manut CI/CD now detects Cloudflare-only push sets and forces GKE component flags false.

hypotheses.hypothesis: The Worker /api/instances/ placeholder is incompatible with current frontend expectations.
hypotheses.mitigation: Worker response now follows nested config and instance contract shape.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Proxying to https://app.manut.xyz from a Worker attached to app.manut.xyz could recurse or blackhole traffic.
hypotheses.mitigation: Default same-origin LEGACY_GKE_ORIGIN was removed and proxy helper refuses same-origin upstreams.

hypotheses.hypothesis: R2 upload handling could accidentally replace GCS before object parity is proven.
hypotheses.mitigation: Uploads remain classified as legacy proxy routes; the R2 handler exists standalone but is not wired into app routing.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Production D1 could report cloudflare-preview because shared migration seeds current_version.
hypotheses.mitigation: Environment-specific current_version seed was removed; runtime falls back to INSTANCE_VERSION.
